rows.label: qev040502_MSG0004
rows.name:
I will definitely complete the Legen-dar-mo.
If you bring the materials,
I will also make the best Infinigoggles-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040502_MSG0005
rows.name:
...BLADE person!
Let's use our combined strength to send my Brother off
on his journey to find the Sword of Legendaryness-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040502_MSG0006
rows.name:
The Terebra that swallowed the Legen-dar
should still be at Biahno Lake-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040502_MSG0007
rows.name:
It's a super gluttonous monster,
so please be careful not to get eaten
and defeat it-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040502_MSG0008
rows.name:
Ah, or... if you give me the money
to make the Legen-dar... 30,000G...
Moimoi will remake it right away-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040502_JNK0010
rows.name: Pay

rows.label: qev040502_SEL0011
rows.name: Give Moimoi 30,000G.

rows.label: qev040502_JNK0020
rows.name: Hunt

rows.label: qev040502_SEL0021
rows.name: Say you will defeat the Terebra.

rows.label: qev040502_MSG0009
rows.name:
Thank you-mo!
As long as he has the money, remaking the same thing
is easy for Moimoi-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040502_MSG0010
rows.name:
As expected of a BLADE! You're so brave-mo!
Well then, I'm counting on you-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040502_MSG0011
rows.name:
Then I'll make it super fast-mo!
Please wait a moment-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040502_MSG0012
rows.name:
...It's done-mo!
Now, please give this to my Brother-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040502_MSG0013
rows.name:
Th-this smell is...
Could it be you retrieved the Legen-dar
from that hateful Terebra-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040502_MSG0014
rows.name:
Thank you-mo!
Then I'll begin the final adjustments-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040502_MSG0015
rows.name:
...It's done-mo!
Now, please give this to my Brother-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040502_MSG0016
rows.name:
I'm sure my Brother will use that radar
and find the Sword of Legendaryness-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040502_MSG0017
rows.name:
With Moimoi's inventions and Brother Muimui's
ability to take action, there's nothing to fear-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040502_MSG0018
rows.name:
We'll prove it together-mo!
And then we'll escape poverty right away-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040502_MSG0019
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]...Fu-mo-mo? Ah, BLADE person,
you don't have 30,000G...?-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040502_MSG0020
rows.name:
Gather the money up
or go defeat the Terebra... either is fine,
but it'd help if you hurried-mo.[ST:wait ]
